title: SMP Optimization
description: Modpack For More FPS and For SMP's
body:

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3902691a2357426eb367117835967dfe253cca25.png)

# ⚡ SMP Optimization

## 🚀 Introduction

SMP Optimization is a performance-focused modpack designed to push Minecraft to its limits while keeping gameplay smooth, responsive, and PvP-ready.

Built for players who want **maximum FPS**, this pack delivers:

* ⚡ Extremely high performance (600+ FPS depending on setup)
* 🎯 PvP-friendly responsiveness
* 🧩 Full resource pack compatibility
* 🧠 Clean and user-friendly experience

This project is actively being developed and improved over time.

---

## 🔥 Why Choose SMP Optimization?

* 🚀 Focused purely on **performance & smooth gameplay**
* 🧪 Multiple versions for different playstyles
* 🎮 Ideal for **PvP, SMP servers, and competitive play**
* ⚙️ Carefully selected mods — no unnecessary bloat

---

## 🧩 Versions

SMP Optimization comes in multiple versions depending on your needs:

| Feature                | Vulkan Version    | Sodium Version           | Optifine Version   |
| ---------------------- | ----------------- | ------------------------ | ------------------ |
| **Performance**        | 🔥 Maximum FPS    | ⚡ High FPS               | ⚡ Balanced         |
| **Shader Support**     | 🟨 Coming Soon   | ✅ Supported              | ✅ Supported        |
| **Estimated FPS**      | 1000+             | 600+                     | 500+               |
| **PvP Ready**          | ✅ Best            | 🟨 Good                  | 🟨 Good            |
| **Best For**           | Competitive / PvP | Everyday gameplay        | Builders / visuals |
| **Supported Versions** | 1.21.11 / 1.21.10 | 1.21.11 / 1.21.10 / 26.1 | 1.21.11            |
| **Recommended GPU**    | RTX 2080+         | GTX 1060+                | GTX 1060+          |

---

## ⚙️ Vulkan vs Sodium

* **Vulkan Version** → Highest possible FPS, lowest latency (no shaders)
* **Sodium Version** → Best balance between performance and visuals
* **Optifine Version** → Good visuals + shaders, slightly lower performance

---

## 📥 Installation

Download the modpack **only from Modrinth**.

⚠️ Do not download from third-party websites.

---

## 📌 Notes

* 🔄 Actively maintained project
* ⚡ Performance may vary depending on your setup
* 🧪 More optimizations and updates coming soon

### *Optimized for speed. Built for performance.*
